description: Frontend / Full Stack Developer (MERN & Python) with 4+ years of experience building scalable web apps and enterprise SaaS products. Expert in responsive frontends with React/Next.js and high-performance backends using Node.js and FastAPI.

descriptions: I am a BCA grad from Karnatak University Dharwad. I started my web development journey by freelancing under my own firm, Yashas Online Promoters, followed by an intensive coding bootcamp at Masai School.

I then joined IBO.com as an SDE-1, working on a high-traffic Next.js e-commerce platform. After that, at Avo Automation (SLK Software), I built complex automation UIs and third-party integrations using React and Redux.

Currently, I am working as a Product Engineer - 2 at The Math Company (MathCo), where I architect scalable services using Keycloak (OAuth 2.0), build high-performance dashboards with React.js and Plotly, and work with FastAPI backends.
With 4+ years of experience, I have a proven track record in performance optimization, enterprise SaaS development, and mastering Agile workflows and scalable system design.
Architected and deployed a centralized authentication & authorization system using Keycloak (OAuth 2.0); engineered secure, scalable services across FastAPI and React.
Developed high-performance, reusable UI components for synchronized dashboards using React.js and Plotly, handling complex data visualizations for real-time analysis.
Led migration to server-side pagination, reducing frontend memory overhead by 40%; enforced code quality standards through rigorous code reviews.
Partnered with backend teams to engineer a dynamic filtering interface with 12+ inter-linked dropdowns utilizing complex state logic, ensuring a seamless user experience.
Designed a parallel execution UI for BrowserStack using React and Redux, reducing manual test configuration workload by 100% and improving workflow efficiency.
Engineered a reliable automation interface to execute SAP Cloud ALM test cases with zero latency, utilizing advanced state management patterns.
Developed integrations with Zephyr Scale and TestRail for automated report synchronization.
Integrated Jira, Azure DevOps, and other third-party tools, enabling seamless test case mapping and real-time status updates.
I have successfully, developed, deployed, and tested a pixel-perfect and responsive user interface for the Front-End web app of IBO
Have worked with UX designers and Product managers to convert design into UI components

Additionally, I have implemented various features such as modifying the cart, obtaining geo-location access for users, and added an Install App pop-up feature, resulting in an increase in the number of app installs and users
Furthermore, I have consistently worked on improving and enhancing its features and performance to meet the growing customer base and traffic demands

In addition to this, I have developed few of the RESTful APIs using NestJS on the Backend For Front-End (BFF) layer. These APIs are responsible for fetching data from core systems like Magento and Oodo, which are then consumed by the Front-End
Founded a freelance firm delivering custom web solutions; managed full lifecycle from requirement gathering to deployment.
Built websites for multiple clients using WordPress and custom web technologies.
Handled end-to-end project management including client communication, design, and deployment.
